_comment: Copy this file to manifest.json (same folder) and point it at YOUR self-hosted image. Then `boot kernel --real` will boot it. Only the keys you use are needed; everything else falls back to v86 defaults from the CDN. See README.md in this folder.
_example_A_iso: Smallest setup: a bootable ISO (e.g. TinyCore ~16MB). Put the .iso in this /vm/ folder.
_example_C_saved_state: Fastest boot: a v86 saved state (.bin.zst) that restores an already-booted Linux instantly.
_optional_overrides: Pin the v86 runtime/BIOS to a self-hosted copy instead of the CDN if you prefer.
